offer: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract milestone deadlines cause penalties. We provide alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem: Missed contract milestone deadlines can lead to penalties and damaged client relationships.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firms seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflow improvements
DM outreach to law firms with a demo video
Participate in community forums for legal tool recommendations
try_it: Let users try deadline tracking and summary reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with a clear call-to-action
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Offer onboarding for the first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing contract data
Streamline the onboarding process for new users
